details.safeProbe: Use the parity request against gid://shopify/Order/0 and gid://shopify/Customer/0 first so Shopify returns validation/userErrors without changing a merchant order's customer.
details.localStagingCandidate: Can be locally staged after fixture-backed semantics by changing the local order customer edge and preserving customer catalog/read behavior.

notes: Planned customer-association parity for `orderCustomerSet`. This root is not locally supported yet; it remains an explicit unsupported passthrough registry entry until validation and downstream order/customer read semantics are captured.
